summary: FQ-08 block and enemy damage visuals: player.mine_damage_stage() (0-3 from mining progress) drives a deterministic per-cell crack overlay on the target tile (reused RNG seeded from the target, endpoints clamped inside the tile, denser per stage) layered over the existing highlight/progress bar. Purely transient: never saved, resets via _reset_mining on target change/release, and apply_state clears in-memory progress so loads never resurrect partial damage — world.gd untouched, zero save growth. Enemies show a mini health bar above the body once damaged on both art and fallback draw paths (health_bar_ratio), keeping the tint cues. Drops, mining frame counts, and save/load semantics verified unchanged. Review: no must-fix or should-fix; three nits applied. Smoke 173 -> 179.
scope: FQ-08 only, per docs/FABLE_TASK_QUEUE.md. Implementation commit f3d8997 plus this evidence-only packet commit; pushed to origin/main.
next_action: FQ-09: visual inventory, toolbelt, and village panels.
